name: Dreaming Diorama
short_description: A casual cozy puzzle game where you create various dioramas. Explore and assemble dioramas in a 3D environment. Enjoy relaxing gameplay that allows you to create dioramas at your own pace with no time restraints.
detailed_description:
Unwind and let your imagination flourish in Dreaming Diorama — a cozy, casual puzzle game where you build enchanting miniature worlds, one piece at a time.

Why You’ll Love It:

  • Puzzle Meets Art – Each diorama is a delightful challenge, crafted from intricate pieces waiting to be assembled.

  • Creative Freedom – Build from any angle, any location. Your strategy is entirely your own.

  • Peaceful Gameplay – No timers, no pressure. Just a relaxing experience at your own pace.

  • Immersive 3D Exploration – Dive into beautifully rendered environments and bring your tiny worlds to life.

Whether you’re a puzzle enthusiast or simply enjoy cozy games, Dreaming Diorama offers the perfect escape. Ready to create something beautiful?

Each diorama is centered around a unique theme — some calm, others lively — offering a variety of moods and atmospheres. As players assemble each scene piece by piece, they contribute to a larger, cohesive experience that unfolds throughout the game. Designed to be both soothing and creatively fulfilling, the game leaves players with a sense of accomplishment upon completion. Whether you love solving puzzles or just enjoy building beautiful things, this game aims to offer a meaningful and enjoyable journey.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Dutch, Greek, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Hungarian, Polish, Bulgarian, Danish, Finnish, Norwegian, Romanian, Swedish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
